title: mercurialis tomentosa
intro: Mercurialis tomentosa, also known as the common dog's mercury or long-stalked dog's mercury, is a perennial flowering plant species in the spurge family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mercurialis tomentosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
